props.ChoiceText: Someone with power decided you were more useful owned than merely hired.
props.ChoiceBio: A patron buying your contract changed your value from hired blade to controlled asset.

0.TransitionText: Because a patron buying your contract changed your value from hired blade to controlled asset, command grew out of survival, reputation, and the obedience of armed men.
0.TransitionPrompt: A patron buying your contract could entangle your future with command, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a patron buying your contract changed your value from hired blade to controlled asset, soldiering for pay changed into something else.
1.TransitionPrompt: A patron buying your contract could pull you into more courtly circles, but you may remain on your current path instead.
